headline: Loop Capital Initiates Coverage On Jack Henry & Associates with Buy Rating, Announces Price Target of $197
summary: Loop Capital  analyst Dominick Gabriele   initiates coverage on Jack Henry & Associates (NASDAQ:JKHY) with a Buy rating and announces Price Target of $197.
